import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F


def spherical_pad(x, pad=1):
    # Circular in longitude (width), reflect in latitude (height)
    x = F.pad(x, (pad, pad, 0, 0), mode='circular')
    x = F.pad(x, (0, 0, pad, pad), mode='reflect')
    return x


class ResBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, channels, dropout=0.0, dilation=1):
        super().__init__()
        pad = dilation
        self.conv1 = nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, kernel_size=3, padding=0, dilation=dilation)
        self.gn1 = nn.GroupNorm(8, channels)
        self.conv2 = nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, kernel_size=3, padding=0, dilation=dilation)
        self.gn2 = nn.GroupNorm(8, channels)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout2d(dropout) if dropout > 0 else nn.Identity()
        self.pad = pad

    def forward(self, x):
        residual = x
        x = spherical_pad(x, self.pad)
        x = F.silu(self.gn1(self.conv1(x)))
        x = self.dropout(x)
        x = spherical_pad(x, self.pad)
        x = self.gn2(self.conv2(x))
        return F.silu(x + residual)


class WeatherModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_ch=6, out_ch=2, hidden=256, num_blocks=12, dropout=0.0, residual=False):
        super().__init__()
        self.residual = residual
        self.input_conv = nn.Conv2d(in_ch, hidden, kernel_size=3, padding=0)
        self.input_gn = nn.GroupNorm(8, hidden)
        blocks = []
        for i in range(num_blocks):
            d = 2 if i >= num_blocks // 2 else 1
            blocks.append(ResBlock(hidden, dropout=dropout, dilation=d))
        self.blocks = nn.Sequential(*blocks)
        # Separate 1x1 heads for each variable
        self.out_z = nn.Conv2d(hidden, 1, kernel_size=1)
        self.out_t = nn.Conv2d(hidden, 1, kernel_size=1)

    def forward(self, x):
        # x: [B, 6, 32, 64]
        last = x[:, 4:6, :, :]  # last time step in normalized space
        x = spherical_pad(x, 1)
        x = F.silu(self.input_gn(self.input_conv(x)))
        x = self.blocks(x)
        z = self.out_z(x)
        t = self.out_t(x)
        x = torch.cat([z, t], dim=1)
        if self.residual:
            x = x + last
        return x
